# InfraNexus Skill Catalog (VS Code)

This folder contains task-specific skills for InfraNexus.

## Available Skills

1. cmdb-domain-model
- CMDB CI/relationship modeling, validation, and semantics.

2. backend-api-graph
- FastAPI routers/services for graph, CI, and search endpoints.

3. etl-servicenow-sync
- Full/incremental ServiceNow ETL, retry, validation, load.

4. frontend-3d-graph
- Three.js + react-force-graph-3d rendering and interactions.

5. state-search-and-merge
- Zustand stores, SWR patterns, merge/dedupe behavior.

6. testing-and-quality
- Test strategy and quality gates (unit/integration/e2e/perf).

7. observability-and-performance
- Metrics, profiling, latency budgets, optimization flow.

8. security-and-governance
- Secret handling, input hardening, rate limits, auth roadmap.

9. devops-local-first
- Docker Compose reliability, health checks, local operations.

10. product-planning-delivery
- PRD planning, milestone design, risk and metric-based delivery.

## How To Use

In chat, describe the task with matching keywords from the skill descriptions.
The agent should load the relevant skill automatically when the description matches.
